meta.title: Tailo
meta.description: Help shelter dogs — donations, walks, care.

home.hero_title: Every tail deserves a happy ending
home.hero_subtitle: Shelter dogs in Montenegro need your help. Donate, walk, or foster — every little bit changes a life.
home.featured_subtitle: These dogs are waiting for someone like you
home.how_subtitle: Three simple steps to make a real difference
home.step1: Choose a dog and read its story
home.step2: Help — donate for treatment, food, or foster care
home.step3: Follow reports, and sign up for a walk if you'd like
home.ways_subtitle: Choose how you'd like to make a difference
home.way_donate_desc: Fund treatment, food, and shelter. Every euro counts. 100% goes to the dogs.
home.way_walk_desc: Sign up for a walk in your city. Dogs need fresh air and socialization — and so do you.
home.way_foster_desc: Give a dog a temporary home while we find them a forever family.
home.way_share_desc: Share a dog's profile on social media. Sometimes the right person just hasn't seen them yet.
home.cta_banner_subtitle: Every dog on Tailo is real, verified by a shelter, and waiting for help. Start today.

dogs.title: Dogs
dogs.subtitle: Each one is waiting for help. Choose a dog, learn its story.
dogs.empty: No dogs yet. Check back later.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to help dogs and sign up for walks.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an account to help dogs.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.empty: No payment methods yet. Add one so donors can send you money directly.
